title: Ace’s Fate and the End of the War

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They've all committed crimes so heinous

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ah... they saw and recognized me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's the giant battleship, Sanjuan Wolf!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The crescent moon hunter, Catarina Devon!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Murun Fufufu, I like you guys. :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How did you all get here!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: HOHO!! My apologies, it's a simple story!!
